entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: inspir मा हाम्रो mission सिकाइलाई सबैका लागि पहुँचयोग्य, engaging र रमाइलो बनाएर democratize गर्नु हो। हामी विश्वास गर्छौं कि पृष्ठभूमि वा परिस्थितिबाट अलग, सबैलाई गुणस्तरीय शिक्षाको अधिकार छ। हाम्रो platform विद्यार्थीहरूलाई सफल हुन चाहिने tools र resources दिन डिजाइन गरिएको हो, साथै सिकाइप्रति प्रेम बढाउन पनि। हामी inclusive, supportive र empowering community बनाउन प्रयास गर्छौं, जहाँ विद्यार्थीहरू एकअर्कासँग र संसारभरका educators सँग connect हुन सक्छन्। सिकाइलाई रमाइलो र पहुँचयोग्य बनाएर, हामी भविष्यका challenges सामना गर्न सक्षम lifelong learners को पुस्तालाई प्रेरित गर्ने लक्ष्य राख्छौं।

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA commercial websites र online services लाई privacy policy post गर्न required गर्ने राष्ट्रको पहिलो state law हो। यस law को reach California भन्दा धेरै बाहिर फैलिन्छ, जसले California consumers बाट personally identifiable information collect गर्ने websites चलाउने United States (र सम्भवतः संसार) का व्यक्ति वा company लाई आफ्नो website मा स्पष्ट privacy policy post गर्न required गर्छ, जसमा exactly कुन information collect भइरहेको छ र कोसँग share भइरहेको छ भनिएको हुन्छ, र त्यस policy को पालना गर्नुपर्ने हुन्छ।

entries.source: Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: १३ वर्षभन्दा कम उमेरका बालबालिकालाई app प्रयोग गर्न प्रोत्साहित गरिन्छ, तर adult supervision अन्तर्गत। तर हामी १३ वर्षभन्दा कम उमेरका बालबालिकाबाट कुनै Personal Information जानाजानी collect वा process गर्दैनौं र parental consent बिना १३ वर्षभन्दा कम उमेरका कुनै user ले हामीलाई personal information दिनु विशेष रूपमा निषेध गर्छौं। यदि तपाईं १३ वर्षभन्दा कम उमेरको बालबालिकाको parent हुनुहुन्छ र तपाईंको child ले हामीलाई Personal Information दिएको छ भन्ने लाग्छ भने, हामी आवश्यक actions लिनेछौं र आवश्यक परे तपाईंलाई notify गर्नेछौं। आवश्यक action का लागि fixed timeline छैन किनकि यो हामीले handle गर्ने queries को volume र उपलब्ध workforce मा निर्भर हुन्छ।

entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: तपाईंको व्यक्तिगत जानकारी मेटाउन। तपाईंले यस्तो अनुरोध गर्नुभयो भने, हामी तपाईंको अनुरोधको मितिसम्म हाम्रो अभिलेखमा रहेको तपाईंको व्यक्तिगत जानकारी मेटाउनेछौं र कुनै सेवा प्रदायकहरूलाई पनि त्यसै गर्न निर्देशन दिनेछौं। केही अवस्थामा जानकारीलाई पहिचानरहित बनाएर मेटाउने काम गर्न सकिन्छ। तपाईंले आफ्नो व्यक्तिगत जानकारी मेटाउने छनोट गर्नुभयो भने, सञ्चालनका लागि तपाईंको व्यक्तिगत जानकारी चाहिने केही सुविधाहरू प्रयोग गर्न नसक्नु हुन सक्छ। तपाईंको व्यक्तिगत जानकारी बिक्री रोक्न। हामी तपाईंको व्यक्तिगत जानकारी कुनै पनि उद्देश्यका लागि कुनै तेस्रो पक्षलाई बेच्दैनौं वा भाडामा दिँदैनौं। हामी तपाईंको व्यक्तिगत जानकारी मौद्रिक प्रतिफलका लागि बेच्दैनौं। तर केही परिस्थितिमा, मौद्रिक प्रतिफल बिना पनि तेस्रो पक्षलाई वा हाम्रो कम्पनी समूहभित्र व्यक्तिगत जानकारी सारिनु California कानूनअन्तर्गत “बिक्री” मानिन सक्छ। तपाईं आफ्नो Personal Data को एक मात्र मालिक हुनुहुन्छ र कुनै पनि समयमा खुलासा वा मेटाउने अनुरोध गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। तपाईंले आफ्नो व्यक्तिगत जानकारी बिक्री रोक्ने अनुरोध गर्नुभयो भने, हामी त्यस्ता स्थानान्तरणहरू रोक्नेछौं। कृपया ध्यान दिनुहोस्, तपाईंले हामीलाई आफ्नो डेटा मेटाउन वा बिक्री रोक्न भन्नुभयो भने यसले हामीसँगको तपाईंको अनुभवमा असर पार्न सक्छ, र तपाईंले सञ्चालनका लागि व्यक्तिगत जानकारी प्रयोग चाहिने केही कार्यक्रम वा सदस्यता सेवामा सहभागी हुन नसक्नु हुन सक्छ। तर कुनै पनि अवस्थामा, आफ्ना अधिकार प्रयोग गरेको कारण हामी तपाईंविरुद्ध भेदभाव गर्नेछैनौं। माथि वर्णन गरिएका California data protection rights प्रयोग गर्न, कृपया आफ्नो अनुरोध इमेलमार्फत पठाउनुहोस्: support@inspir.app माथि वर्णन गरिएका तपाईंका डेटा संरक्षण अधिकारहरू CCPA अर्थात् California Consumer Privacy Act द्वारा समेटिएका छन्। थप जान्न आधिकारिक California Legislative Information वेबसाइट हेर्नुहोस्। CCPA 01/01/2020 देखि लागू भयो।

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
entries.value: हामी Do Not Track signals सम्मान गर्छौं र Do Not Track browser mechanism लागू हुँदा track गर्दैनौं, cookies राख्दैनौं, वा advertising प्रयोग गर्दैनौं। Do Not Track तपाईंले आफ्नो web browser मा set गर्न सक्ने preference हो जसले websites लाई तपाईं track हुन चाहनुहुन्न भनेर जानकारी दिन्छ। तपाईं आफ्नो web browser को Preferences वा Settings page मा गएर Do Not Track enable वा disable गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। तपाईं 18 वर्षभन्दा कम उमेरको हुनुहुन्छ, California मा बस्नुहुन्छ, र Service मा registered account छ भने, तपाईंले Services मा सार्वजनिक रूपमा post गरेको unwanted data हटाउन अनुरोध गर्ने अधिकार छ। त्यस्तो data हटाउन अनुरोध गर्न, कृपया तल दिइएको contact information प्रयोग गरेर हामीलाई सम्पर्क गर्नुहोस्, र आफ्नो account सँग जोडिएको email address तथा तपाईं California मा बस्नुहुन्छ भन्ने statement समावेश गर्नुहोस्। हामी data Services मा सार्वजनिक रूपमा display नहोस् भनेर सुनिश्चित गर्नेछौं, तर कृपया बुझ्नुहोस् कि data हाम्रो सबै systems बाट पूर्ण वा व्यापक रूपमा हट्न नसक्न सक्छ (जस्तै backups आदि)।

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: World History सबै समयमा picture बाट zoom out गरेजस्तै भएको छ, एउटा निरन्तर बदलिइरहने picture। 19th century अघिका centuries ले human history मा turning point चिन्हित गरे, जब world flat र limited view बाट new territories र colonies को बढ्दो understanding तर्फ सर्दै गयो। French Revolution पहिलो पटक थियो जब ठूलो population protest गर्न र liberty, equality, र fraternity का ideals establish गर्न भेला भयो। World War II का events ले पनि अर्को century का लागि world shape गरे र 21st century को foundation राखे।

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: तपाईंको information, Personal Data सहित, तपाईंको state, province, country, वा अन्य governmental jurisdiction बाहिर रहेका computers मा transfer र maintain हुन सक्छ, जहाँ data protection laws तपाईंको jurisdiction भन्दा फरक हुन सक्छन्। तपाईं India बाहिर हुनुहुन्छ र हामीलाई information provide गर्ने छनोट गर्नुहुन्छ भने, कृपया ध्यान दिनुहोस् कि हामी data, Personal Data सहित, India मा transfer गरी त्यही process गर्छौं। तपाईंले यो Privacy Policy मा दिएको consent र त्यसपछि यस्तो information submit गर्नुले त्यो transfer मा तपाईंको agreement जनाउँछ। Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ले तपाईंको data secure रूपमा र यो Privacy Policy अनुसार treated होस् भनेर reasonably necessary सबै steps लिनेछ, र तपाईंको data तथा अन्य personal information को security सहित adequate controls नभएसम्म तपाईंको Personal Data कुनै organisation वा country मा transfer हुने छैन।
